title: Planner Framework Document Section (Flat Per-Item)
description: Validates flat per-item YAML for itemKind 'document-section' authored under planner Framework Skills that emit handoff or work-item content (e.g., Responsible AI output formats). Distinct from the content-generation document-section schema used by template Framework Skills: identifies audience (ado|github|review|both), output format, inline template body, and optional token list. additionalProperties is true so framework-specific render hints pass through.

itemKind.description: Discriminator marking this item as a document-section.

audience.description: Downstream consumer audience for the rendered section.

format.description: Output format of the rendered section.

template.description: Inline template body. May contain {{token}} references resolved by the host agent at render time.

tokens.description: Token names referenced by the template; the host agent supplies values at render time.

phaseHint.description: Optional phase identifier indicating when the section is rendered (e.g., 'phase-5-impact-assessment').
